description: A product is found to be defective and needs to be returned to the original supplier for credit.

nodes.task_description: Identify the defective stock and the original purchase order it came from.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the PO for the defective items.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier to get authorization to return the defective goods.

expected_outcome.value: The supplier provides a Return to Vendor (RTV) authorization number.

nodes.task_description: Pack the defective goods and ship them back to the supplier.
Track the return shipment and ensure a credit is received from the supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the supplier has received the return and issued a credit.
